calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Termination Of Trust
Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Botto (Counsel for the Trustee, Philip Hudner); Philip Warden (Cousel for the Trust and Mr. Hudner in his individual capacity with respect to certain civil litigation); Carolyn Sue Mosley (Objector in pro per - by telephone appearance).

At the outset, Mr. Warden objected to the untimely filing of Ms. Mosley's written objections to the Petition as well her standing to file the same. He also noted the procedural history of the civil litigation as well as certain results from the Court of Appeal. After response by Ms. Mosley and rebuttal by Mr. Warden and Mr. Botto, the Court took the matter under submission.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.
